## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Prompt Used
The exact text you typed into the PressViber chat:
```
(paste your prompt here)
```

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected the agent to do.

## Actual Behaviour
What the agent actually did. Include which tools it called if visible in the response.

## Error Output
Any PHP errors from `wp-content/debug.log` (enable with `define('WP_DEBUG_LOG', true)` in `wp-config.php`):
```
(paste errors here)
```
